issues.title: Incorrect field name (consultants vs assigned_consultants)
issues.attack: Design spec uses Project.objects.filter(consultants=...) but the actual model field is assigned_consultants
issues.response: Correct. Will fix to assigned_consultants in the spec.

issues.title: Duplicate _get_org with no DRY strategy
issues.attack: _get_org exists in both projects/views.py and clients/views.py; modifying one creates inconsistency
issues.response: Will consolidate to accounts/helpers.py and import in both apps.

issues.title: InviteCode brute-force risk from fixed prefix
issues.attack: Example code 'SYNCO-A3K9' has only 4 random chars; no rate limiting specified
issues.response: Clarify spec: 8 fully random chars, no prefix. Rate limiting deferred to impl plan.

issues.title: OneToOneField prevents multi-org
issues.attack: User receiving invite codes from two orgs will hit integrity error
issues.response: Intentional design: single-org per user. Login flow prevents reaching invite screen when membership exists.

issues.title: Missing Membership.status field definition
issues.attack: Spec uses Membership.status throughout but never defines the field, choices, default, or migration
issues.response: Will add formal field definition: CharField, choices=[active,pending,rejected], default=active, with RunPython migration.

issues.title: Pending user redirect loop risk
issues.attack: Middleware vs decorator ambiguity; middleware risks infinite redirect for pending users
issues.response: Will specify membership_required decorator approach instead of middleware.

issues.title: No mobile nav role-based filtering
issues.attack: Mobile bottom nav has no role filtering; consultant sees all items
issues.response: Access control is at view/decorator level, not nav UI. Mobile nav refinement is phase 2 polish.

issues.title: Rejected user can re-apply infinitely
issues.attack: Deleting Membership on rejection lets user re-enter same invite code immediately
issues.response: Will use Membership.status=rejected instead of deletion. Adds 'rejected' to status choices.

issues.title: 승인 요청 naming collision (project vs member approval)
issues.attack: Two different approval types sharing same sidebar label confuses users
issues.response: Rename existing to '프로젝트 승인'; member approval goes under '조직 관리' page only.

issues.title: OneToOneField prevents multi-org (follow-up)
issues.attack: Re-evaluation of rebuttal
issues.response: Red team withdrew. Login flow logic prevents the integrity error scenario.

issues.title: No mobile nav role-based filtering (follow-up)
issues.attack: Re-evaluation of rebuttal
issues.response: Red team withdrew. Agreed this is phase 2 polish, not a design flaw.

issues.title: _get_org not consolidated into accounts/helpers.py
issues.attack: Agreed design requires consolidation but impl plan modifies in-place in both files
issues.response: Will create accounts/helpers.py and merge into Task 2.

issues.title: Wrong field name 'consultants' throughout plan
issues.attack: Model uses assigned_consultants but plan uses consultants in Task 6 and Task 8
issues.response: Will replace all occurrences with assigned_consultants.

issues.title: Missing 'rejected' status in Membership.Status choices
issues.attack: Agreed design has 3 choices but impl only has 2
issues.response: Will add REJECTED choice and all related views/templates/tests.

issues.title: Wrong import pattern in tests (__import__)
issues.attack: Non-idiomatic import pattern for Django test Client
issues.response: Will use standard from django.test import Client as TestClient.

issues.title: Form field name mismatch with model (consultants vs assigned_consultants)
issues.attack: Django ModelForm save_m2m won't work with mismatched field name
issues.response: Covered by I-R1-02 resolution.

issues.title: No explicit RunPython migration verification
issues.attack: CLAUDE.md requires RunPython with reverse_func for data migrations
issues.response: Added migration verification note. Django default handles forward case.

issues.title: 승인 요청 sidebar label not renamed to 프로젝트 승인
issues.attack: Agreed design renamed it but impl plan still uses old name
issues.response: Will change to 프로젝트 승인 in Task 7.

issues.title: Stale design spec path in header
issues.attack: References old pre-tempering spec location
issues.response: Updated to design-spec-agreed.md path.

issues.title: No anonymous user check in membership_required decorator
issues.attack: AttributeError on AnonymousUser if @login_required omitted
issues.response: Consistent @login_required stacking prevents this. Docstring note sufficient.

issues.title: Redundant final git add -A commit in Task 10
issues.attack: All prior tasks already commit; may include temp files from manual testing
issues.response: Removed Task 10 Step 5.

issues.title: No anonymous user check (follow-up)
issues.attack: Re-evaluation of rebuttal
issues.response: Red team withdrew. Consistent decorator stacking is sufficient.
